name: Oriental Garbanzo Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat a heavy sauté pan.
2. Add oil and onion to the pan, then sauté until the onion is soft.
3. Add 1 cup of cold water. Stir in flour until smooth.
4. Gradually stir in the remaining water.
5. Add seasonings (soy sauce, garlic powder if using).
6. Cook over medium-low heat until slightly thickened, stirring occasionally.
7. If a higher heat is preferred, continue stirring constantly without allowing it to boil.
Source: Arrowhead Mills "toasted Garbanzo Flour" tri-fold
